description: Assess new engineering work before execution by classifying the work type, choosing the right lifecycle starting phase and workflow, and producing an intake brief for approval. Use when a user is starting a new product, migration, major cross-cutting initiative, multi-sprint tech debt effort, broad documentation push, or says they are unsure where to begin and need routing before implementation. Also use when a feature, refactor, or incident needs scope triage first rather than immediate execution. Do not use for tasks already in progress or already tightly scoped: specific debugging with stack traces, writing tests for a known function, running commands, trivial edits, reviewing PRs, or pure knowledge questions.

results.query: hey so our checkout page has been throwing 500 errors since this mornings deploy, about 15% of users are affected and were losing revenue every minute. need this fixed asap
我们的 SaaS 产品需要加一个团队协作功能，用户可以在项目里 @mention 队友然后自动发通知。这个功能优先级很高，Q2 就要上线
ok 这个 auth module 我想重构一下，现在是个 2000 行的 god class，auth、session management、password reset、OAuth 全 mixed 在一起，完全没有 tests。我要 break it apart properly
我们的老系统是 PHP 5.6 写的单体应用，现在要逐步迁移到 Go 微服务架构。数据库从 MySQL 迁到 PostgreSQL。团队有 8 个人，预计耗时 6 个月
I want to build a personal finance tracker app from scratch. It should have expense categorization, budget alerts, and bank API integration via Plaid. I'm a solo dev, thinking React + Node
想花两个 sprint 专门搞 tech debt，CI pipeline 跑了 45 分钟，test coverage 才 30%，一堆 deprecated API calls 要清理。team lead 已经 approve 了 capacity
we need to add GDPR compliance to our user data handling - right-to-deletion, data export, consent management. Our legal team says we have 3 months to be compliant
帮我搞一下这个项目，我也不太确定从哪开始。大概是想做一个内部工具，让运营团队可以自己配置推送规则而不用每次找开发改代码
there's a race condition in our payment service 的 mutex handling，两个 concurrent requests 可能会 charge 同一个 order 两次。I found it in src/payments/processor.go line 142，这个比较紧急
刚加入这个 team，发现整个 codebase 200k lines 完全没有 documentation，README 是空的，architecture docs 也没有。我想先把 docs 搞起来再开始 contribute code
帮我把这个函数的变量名从 x, y, z 改成更有意义的名字，就这一个函数，大概 20 行代码
Review this PR for me: https://github.com/our-org/api/pull/847. Focus on the error handling changes in the middleware
can you explain how kubernetes horizontal pod autoscaling works? I'm trying to understand the algorithm behind it
帮我跑一下 npm test 看看哪些 case fail 了
这段代码有个 typo，第 15 行的 recieve 应该是 receive，帮我改一下
帮我 debug 这个报错：TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map')。stack trace 指向 src/components/UserList.tsx:23
REST 和 GraphQL 到底选哪个好？我下个 project 想用，但是 team 里面没人用过 GraphQL，不确定 learning curve 会不会太陡
git rebase main onto my feature branch and resolve the conflicts in package.json please
write unit tests for the calculateDiscount function in src/pricing/discount.ts. Cover edge cases like negative prices, zero quantity, and expired coupons
把 README 里面 Redis cache 那段 env variables 的配置说明更新一下，加上我们新增的 REDIS_CLUSTER_MODE 和 REDIS_SENTINEL_HOSTS 两个变量
